title: Entrepreneurs
questions: Are entrepreneurs encouraged in your country? Does the government support entrepreneurs in any way?
In which areas do the people from your county have entrepreneurial spirit? Do you?
What are the biggest growth-industries the moment? Which would you choose if you wanted to start a business?
What are the advantages/disadvantages of being an entrepreneur?
Which entrepreneur do you admire the most?
Do you think 'Entrepreneur-ship' should be a subject that is taught at school?
Would you like to start your own business? What kind of business would it be?
'Profit is the reward for risk.' Do you agree or disagree?
Are you good at handling risk and insecurity?
Is it difficult to find a profitable niche in this day and age?
More and more jobs are being done by computers and machines. Which industries do you think are future proof?
